texto: Homer, Hesiod, Pythagoras, Plato, and Cicero, just to name a few, all lived in pagan societies. Some of the greatest political and military leaders of all time, such as Alexander the Great, Pericles of Athens, Hannibal of Carthage, and Julius Caesar of Rome, were all pagans, or else living in a pagan society.
explicacao: Citação de Brendan Myers sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Homer, Hesiod, Pythagoras, Plato, and Cicero, just to name a few, all lived in pagan societies. S…” articula lideranca, time, great em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como great e military.
